11:["$","p",null,{"children":["The schema can be anything supported by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"yieldless/schema"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"safeParse()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"parse()"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"safeParseAsync()"}],", or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"parseAsync()"}],"."]}]

13:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"parseEnvSafe()"}]," defaults to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"process.env"}]," when it exists."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"pickEnv()"}]," is useful for tests and for avoiding accidental coupling to unrelated variables."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"EnvVarError.code"}]," is either ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ERR_ENV_MISSING"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"ERR_ENV_EMPTY"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"readOptionalEnv()"}]," returns ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[null, undefined]"}]," for missing values but still rejects empty strings unless ",["$","code",null,{"children":"allowEmpty"}]," is enabled."]}],"\n"]}]
14:["$","$L1e",null,{}]
